title: Gingered Jamaican Tomatoes Tagliere
description: A refreshing, aerated Jamaican dish featuring sashimi-cut baby plum tomatoes, infused with the warmth of ginger and the zing of scotch bonnet peppers.

ingredients.name: Scotch bonnet peppers, seeded and chopped

instructions: In a small saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and chopped scotch bonnet peppers, and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and cook for 1 minute, or until the cilantro has wilted.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Arrange the sashimi-cut baby plum tomatoes on a tagliere or serving platter.
Drizzle the gingered pepper sauce over the tomatoes and serve immediately.
